title: Filipino Stew with Smoky Tofu
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with smoky tofu, served with a side of creamy sauce. This Filipino-inspired dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add the tomato paste and stir well.
Add the fish sauce, soy sauce, and brown sugar. Stir well.
Add the pressed smoky tofu and stir well.
Pour in the stew and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot with a side of creamy sauce.
